theme_archetype.description: A cinematic, editorial spa feel inspired by ever.co.id. Employs generous negative space, sophisticated typography (serif + minimal sans), and alternating dark/light sections to create depth and rhythm.

fonts.heading: Cormorant Garamond, ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, Times New Roman, Times, serif
fonts.body: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight

motion_interaction.marquee: slow continuous scroll for editorial ribbons

sections.layout: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-background_light/80 border-b border-border_light
sections.content: Brand mark centered or left. Links to /book, /manage, /login. Minimal and sleek. Dark mode variant when over hero.

sections.layout: relative h-[90vh] w-full flex items-center justify-center text-center overflow-hidden
sections.background: Cinematic full-viewport image with bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.
sections.content: Tagline in H1. Primary CTA ('Book now' -> /book) and Secondary CTA ('Discover treatments' -> scroll down). Both buttons minimal, sharp corners, or 1px border.

sections.layout: py-8 border-y border-border_light bg-background_light overflow-hidden flex
sections.content: Continuously scrolling text: 'BEAUTY IN EVERY DETAIL • YOUR BEAUTY CELEBRATED • PRECISE TOUCH • ' in font-serif text-2xl.

sections.layout: section_padding container bg-background_light text-text_dark grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center
sections.content: Left: Large atmospheric image. Right: Overline 'Our Philosophy', H2 'Quiet luxury for your body.', Body text explaining the spa's approach. Asymmetric alignment.

sections.layout: section_padding pl-6 md:pl-12 bg-background_dark text-text_light overflow-hidden
sections.header: H2 'Signature Treatments' with generous bottom margin.
sections.content: Cards with large numerals (01, 02), evocative image, service name, brief description. Links formatted as 'Book this service |' pointing to /book?service=<id>.
Grid of location cards. Each card has a location photo, Salon Name (H3), City, Address, Hours. 'Book at this salon' CTA -> /book?salon=<id>.
Grid of stylist portraits. Name, Bio. 'Book with <Name>' CTA -> /book?stylist=<id>.
H2 'Begin Your Journey', Subtext about first-visit incentive. Large CTA 'Book an Appointment'.

sections.layout: py-20 container bg-background_light border-t border-border_light text-text_dark
sections.content: Massive brand text or logo. Contact info, salon addresses, social links, legal.

components_guidance.buttons: Flat, rectangular, no border-radius. High contrast. Hover states invert colors.
components_guidance.cards: Cardless design. Rely on grid gaps and images to define boundaries. No generic drop shadows. Use 1px borders if separation is needed.
components_guidance.images: Use unoptimized aspect ratios (e.g., 3:4 for portraits, 16:9 for cinematic). Apply grayscale or sepia filters subtly via CSS if it helps unity, but full color is fine if curated.

hero.alt: Woman receiving facial mask treatment at luxury spa

philosophy_image.usage: Left side of the philosophy section

locations_fallback.alt: Salon shelves with luxury skincare products
